org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua
Class B2buaServlet

java.lang.Object
  javax.servlet.GenericServlet
      javax.servlet.sip.SipServlet
          org.vorpal.blade.framework.AsyncSipServlet
              org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, EventListener, Servlet, ServletConfig, ServletContextListener, javax.servlet.sip.SipServletListener, javax.servlet.sip.TimerListener, B2buaListener
public abstract class B2buaServlet
extends AsyncSipServlet
implements B2buaListener

This class implements a simple back-to-back user agent. It accepts an incoming SipServletRequest object and creates an outgoing copy of it. By extending this class and overriding the B2buaListener interface methods, users can create simple routing applications by modifying the outgoing request or response objects before they are sent.

See Also:
Serialized Form

Method Summary
abstract  void callAbandoned(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest outboundRequest)
          This method is called in response to receiving a CANCEL request.
abstract  void callAnswered(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse outboundResponse)
          Called after a 200 OK is received.
abstract  void callCompleted(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest outboundRequest)
          This method is called after receiving a BYE request.
abstract  void callConnected(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest outboundRequest)
          This method is called after the ACK for the initial INVITE is received.
abstract  void callDeclined(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse outboundResponse)
          This method is called after receiving an error status (like 404).
abstract  void callStarted(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest outboundRequest)
          Called upon an initial INVITE.
protected  Callflow chooseCallflow(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest inboundRequest)
          Implement this method to choose various Callflow objects for incoming requests that do not already have a callflow defined.

chooseCallflow

protected Callflow chooseCallflow(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest inboundRequest)
                           throws ServletException,
                                  IOException
Description copied from class: AsyncSipServlet
Implement this method to choose various Callflow objects for incoming requests that do not already have a callflow defined.

Specified by:
chooseCallflow in class AsyncSipServlet
Returns:
Callflow the chosen callflow object
Throws:
ServletException
IOException

callStarted

public abstract void callStarted(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest outboundRequest)
                          throws ServletException,
                                 IOException
Description copied from interface: B2buaListener
Called upon an initial INVITE. This method contain a copy of the initial request from the caller to be sent to the caller after this method has been invoked. You may modify this SipServletRequest object. (Do not call the .send() method.)

Specified by:
callStarted in interface B2buaListener
Parameters:
outboundRequest - copy of the initial INVITE to be modified before sending
Throws:
ServletException - an exception
IOException - an exception

callAnswered

public abstract void callAnswered(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletResponse outboundResponse)
                           throws ServletException,
                                  IOException
Description copied from interface: B2buaListener
Called after a 200 OK is received. This response object may be modified before it is sent back. (Do not call the .send() method.)

Specified by:
callAnswered in interface B2buaListener
Parameters:
outboundResponse - modifiable successful response object
Throws:
ServletException - an exception
IOException - an exception
